name: any2ppt
description: An image-first deck workflow for turning text, PDF, or URL source material into deck briefs, storyboards, image-generation prompts, and generated slide images through the official $imagegen skill.

interface.shortDescription: Turn source material into image-first slide prompts and generated slide images.
interface.longDescription: Any2PPT coordinates an image-first deck production workflow: ingest text / PDF / URL, shape the argument, plan slide storyboards, write image-generation prompts, invoke the official $imagegen skill to produce full-slide images, and run a rule-based review before delivery. Five specialist skills: deck-producer, document-ingestor, story-architect, slide-storyboarder, visual-director. V0.3 uses a single $imagegen route to prevent accidental local-rendered or PowerPoint-native output, and should not delegate active runs to installed native-PPTX skills such as Codex Presentations or Anthropic pptx.
defaultPrompt: Turn this transcript into a deck storyboard.
Create slide prompts and generate images from this outline.
Ingest this PDF (or URL) and start a deck.
Generate image-first slides with image generation.
